title: LFG: I did something (AI/algo vet joins crypto)
author: literally_joe_bauers
selftext:
Hey guys,

I am researching AI/algo since xx years and work as VP in a 300k+ empl. company - I did some lucrative crypto back in the days and decided last year to invest in some new stuff.

Fast forward: I have my own low-lat streams covering all major exchanges, own dydx/btc.. L1/L2, partially L3.. (combinend \~ 80 streams feeding Kafka and CH), a multi-server hot/warm/cold setup… everything very enterpise (SLAs, Protobuf/contracts, distributed setup..).. (current raw ingest value at \~ 8k per month if you would buy it)

.. and on top about 20 distributed real time analytics and AI streams (Basic stuff like hawkes, lead-lag… up to really fancy things like TDA, SSM, DeepLOB, epsilon machines and stuff)…

On top sits some EFE/Active Inference decision layer (currently evaluating also stuff like GflowNet, Planning as Inference, etc.. so my „home turf“ - deep applied AI)

Did this all by myself and with my money, producing some good numbers..  anyone interested in joining? Looking for pros /w similar experience and some stable background :)

What I would especially be looking for: someone taking care of the whole social signal mining (ingestion, corr/causal, EDA, et. al.) … or someone with strong data engineering background ramping up the ws/kafka/pb/ch ecosystem… but other skills could be welcome as well..

Current evaluation for the ecosystem as-is stays at \~10M USD; /w proof of returns (not just OOS / shadow) should go up to \~50M USD+

I am not interested in investements, unless they come with skills and implementation power.. but money for its own sake is currently not needed.

Best

comments.author: geographbae
comments.body:
Definitely interested to help out here. About to jump into the social momentum for my own project. Don’t have much capital but lots of dev and ai experience. Took a departure from my crypto project to build a contextual persistence and longitudinal memory service - now I can utilize it as a task queue as well….anyways. Happy to tell you more about my project / share vision for social and answer any questions. 

Sounds like you have achieved lots of success without social which is very impressive. Definitely curious to exchange ideas, too

Either way, cheers and great work
